name: Members Choice Wv
description_short: Members Choice WV is a federal credit union established in 1942, serving over 6,100 members in Charleston, West Virginia with comprehensive banking services.
description_long: Members Choice WV Federal Credit Union was established in 1942 and is headquartered in Charleston, West Virginia. As the 13th largest credit union in the state, it has grown to serve over 6,100 loyal members with assets exceeding $91.2 million. The organization operates a single branch location at 201 Ohio Avenue with dedicated staff of over 15 employees. The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products and services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), credit cards, personal loans, auto loans, business loans, and mortgage options. Members also have access to modern banking conveniences such as mobile banking apps (iOS and Android), online banking with bill pay capabilities, remote deposit capture, e-statements, wire transfers, and drive-thru teller services. They provide specialized accounts including IRA/KEOGH accounts and money market products to serve diverse financial needs. Members Choice WV differentiates itself through personalized member service and community focus. Recent member reviews consistently highlight the credit union's responsiveness to individual financial situations and the professionalism of their staff. The institution provides financial calculators, student scholarships, and maintains robust online and mobile platforms for convenience, demonstrating commitment to member accessibility and education. As a community-focused credit union with a single branch, Members Choice WV is best suited for Charleston-area residents and those eligible for membership who value personalized service and local banking relationships. The single-branch model limits physical accessibility compared to larger institutions, though online banking options partially offset this limitation. Their membership eligibility requirements favor specific geographic and community connections rather than serving a broader national audience.
pros: Established 84-year history (founded 1942) with stable financial footing of $91.2M+ in assets
Modern digital banking including mobile apps for iOS and Android, online bill pay, and remote deposit capture
Personalized member service with staff described as 'very nice, friendly, and professional' in recent reviews
Comprehensive product suite including mortgages, business loans, auto loans, and investment products (IRAs, CDs)
Community-focused institution offering student scholarships and financial calculators to members
Multiple account types with 6,200+ regular savings accounts and 3,300+ share draft accounts showing strong member engagement
Electronic banking conveniences including drive-thru teller, e-statements, and electronic signature authentication
cons: Single branch location severely limits physical accessibility compared to multi-branch banks or credit unions
Lobby currently closed according to website, reducing in-person banking availability
Limited network of only 1 ATM, restricting cash access options for members
Membership eligibility restricted to specific geographic community, not open to general public
Small institution size (6,100 members, 15 employees) may limit specialized financial advisory services
best_for: Charleston, West Virginia residents seeking personalized community banking relationships
Members eligible for the credit union who prefer local institution support over large banks
Small business owners needing accessible business loan and banking services from a relationship-focused lender
Savers and borrowers who value digital banking convenience alongside personal service interaction
diagnosis: Members Choice WV is best for Charleston-area residents and eligible community members who prioritize personalized service and local banking relationships over branch convenience. The main caveat is the single-branch model with limited ATM access and currently closed lobby, making it less suitable for members needing frequent physical banking access or those outside the immediate Charleston area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
